name: daily-ops
description: Daily workflow orchestration for Pavi Proczko. Morning briefings with parallel data gathering (4 calendars, email triage, Notion tasks, Littlebird Log), session handoffs between web and CLI, mid-day inbox triage, quick task capture to Notion, and end-of-day reviews. Uses the 3-3-3 method for task organization and Cora-style intelligent email processing.
author: Pavitas Productions
